title: component-discovery-adapter
description: Stack-agnostic interface for component discovery in design agents (dso:ui-designer, ui-discover). Each web framework implements this interface as a JSON adapter file. Agents dispatch through adapters based on the design.template_engine config value.

name.description: Unique adapter identifier using lowercase kebab-case.

route_patterns.description: Patterns for discovering routes/pages and their template associations.

decorator_patterns.description: Regex patterns that identify route handler declarations in source files.

template_render_patterns.description: Regex patterns that identify how a route handler renders its template/view (e.g. render_template(), return JSX).

registration_patterns.description: Regex patterns that identify how routes are registered with the application.

component_file_patterns.description: Patterns for discovering and analyzing component/macro files.

glob_patterns.description: Glob patterns to find component files in the project.

definition_patterns.description: Regex patterns to extract component/macro definitions from source files.

import_patterns.description: Regex patterns to find component imports and usage references.

exclude_patterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude from component discovery (e.g. test files, vendor code). Optional — skills apply sensible defaults.

template_syntax.description: Patterns describing the template engine's syntax for defining, inheriting, and including components.

component_definition.description: Pattern that identifies a component/macro definition in a template file.

inheritance_pattern.description: Pattern that identifies template inheritance (e.g. {% extends %}, import Layout).

include_patterns.description: Patterns that identify template includes and imports.

block_patterns.description: Patterns that identify overridable template blocks/slots. Optional — not all frameworks use block-based inheritance.

framework_detection.description: Rules for auto-detecting whether this adapter applies to a given project.

marker_files.description: File paths (relative to project root) whose presence suggests this framework. Checked in order; first match wins.

marker_keys.description: Key-value checks within marker files. Each entry specifies a dot-path key and what to look for.

key.description: Dot-notation path within the marker file to check for framework presence.

file.description: Which marker file this key applies to. Defaults to the first marker_file.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this key check validates.

annotatedPattern.description: A regex pattern with a human-readable description of what it matches.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this pattern matches.

capture_groups.description: Optional map of capture group index/name to its semantic meaning.
